query: I need to add a new proposals page to Assembly. It should list all proposals with status filtering and link to a detail view. The handler needs to pull from the proposals table and the template should use our standard page layout.
the docker container keeps crashing when I run templ generate inside it. Getting some error about missing go.sum entries for the datastar package

need to write a migration that adds a voted_at timestamp to the votes table and backfills it from the created_at column
how do I set up the SSE endpoint for real-time vote count updates? I want the dashboard to show live results as members vote

lets deploy this to production. whats the docker compose setup for the prod server again? I think we need to update the env vars too

I need to write a blog post about why we chose Go over Rails for our governance platform. Can you help me draft it?
The baseline rhythm is off on the meetings page. The heading spacing doesn't align to the 4px grid. How do I fix the CSS?
Can you review this Craft CMS template? The Twig loop isn't paginating correctly and I think the eager loading is wrong
help me set up a new Nuxt project for the Design Machines marketing site. I need SSR with Tailwind
